# Prismatic Platform Documentation

## Architecture
The Prismatic Platform is an enterprise-grade AI-orchestrated intelligence system built with Elixir/OTP.
It features autonomous agents, umbrella applications, and extensive OSINT source integrations.

## Tech Stack
- **Backend:** Elixir / OTP / Phoenix LiveView
- **Frontend:** Tailwind CSS / Flowbite / Alpine.js
- **Database:** PostgreSQL / Redis / Meilisearch / KuzuDB
- **Deployment:** Fly.io (Docker)

## Key Concepts
- **Agents:** Autonomous entities following the AIAD standard.
- **SEADF:** Self-Evolving Autonomous Development Framework.
- **NABLA Infinity:** Epistemic framework for truth validation.
- **Trinity Gate:** Validation mechanism ensuring structural, logical, and formal consistency.

## Documentation
- `/apps/` - Application documentation
- `/agents/` - Agent definitions and capabilities
- `/osint/` - OSINT source integrations
- `/architecture/` - System architecture details
- `/technologies/` - Technology stack information
